description:
Create two course-level badges in the Introduction to Biology (BIO101) course.

Badge 1:
- Name: Lab Safety Certified
- Description: Awarded to learners who demonstrate lab safety competency as verified by the instructor
- Image: /home/ga/badge_images/safety_badge.png
- Criteria: Manual issue by Teacher role
- Status: Enabled

Badge 2:
- Name: Biology Course Complete
- Description: Awarded upon successful completion of the Introduction to Biology course
- Image: /home/ga/badge_images/completion_badge.png
- Criteria: Course completion
- Status: Enabled

Login as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!).
